channel.title: TACO | Trump Always Chickens Out
channel.description: A live-data daily tracker of market pressure, financial stress, and TACO-style retreat conditions.

item.title: 2026-03-27 TACO Pressure Index Update: High at 50.00
item.description: Automated market-pressure update for 2026-03-27: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 50.00/100, signaling a high pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.

item.title: 2026-03-26 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 40.00
item.description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-03-26: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 40.00/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.

item.title: 2026-03-25 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 30.00
item.description: Automated market-pressure update for 2026-03-25: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 30.00/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.

item.title: 2026-03-24 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 20.00
item.description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-03-24: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 20.00/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and front-end rate pressure shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
